content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty up +0.47% with broad sector strength (Auto +1.66%, IT +1.09%, Pharma +0.87%) but Metals weak (-0.71%). VIX dropping -4.5% to 17.23 suggests easing fear. Book is 50% deployed with +0.73% session P&L; priority is managing existing winners with trailing SLs rather than aggressive new entries given poor 5-day win rate (14%, profit factor 0.4x).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.02,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +5.6%. Current SL at 1028 already locks in ~4.5% gain — keeping as is. CMP 1040 vs SL 1028 = ~1.2% room. Thesis intact post strong Q4 (PAT +18%, GNPA <1%). HOLD with current trail."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge position -1.9%. SL at 119 (~2.9% below CMP) appropriate. Hold through Fed; thesis intact as geopolitical hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1432.00,
      "new_target": 1485.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.9% at 52-week high after blowout Q4 (+27% PAT). Trailing SL up from 1425 to 1432 (still above entry 1412.94) to lock in ~1.3% gain while giving room to run toward 1485 target. R:R remains favorable."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position essentially flat (+0.1%). SL already at entry (breakeven). No change needed. Q4 results May 15 will be the catalyst. Power demand surge + summer peak supports thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.4%. SL at 1735 already at breakeven+ (above entry 1734). 5.3x volume surge confirms momentum post Organon deal. Letting it run toward 1830 target. Will trail higher if move extends."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 316.50,
      "new_target": 335.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL from 315 to 316.50 (closer to entry 320.50, narrows risk). Position essentially flat; transmission sector capex tailwind intact, Q4 results May 19. Small SL tighten reduces per-position risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.7%. SL at 465 (~0.1% below CMP) is tight — already up +2.91% on session post Q4 (+11% PAT, dividend Rs 5.25). Letting it work; if it dips through 465 it confirms exhaustion."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 598.00,
      "new_target": 660.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.4% but Apr 30 is ex-dividend date (Rs 11/share = ~1.8% mechanical adjustment tomorrow). Tightening SL from 590 to 598 to reduce risk ahead of ex-div mechanical drop. Bearish engulfing on Apr 23 daily candle is a warning. Q4 was strong but stock failed to hold gains."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 2400 from earlier. Letting it sit; not stacking. Pharma sector strong but no rush to chase."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.02,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1028 already locks in +4.5% — no further tighten needed; CMP-to-SL gap is ~1.2% which is appropriate room near R1 1001."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; current SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1432.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailing SL up to 1432 to lock in gains as stock makes new 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven; awaiting catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven+. Strong volume momentum; let it run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 316.50,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL slightly to reduce per-position risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 465.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already tight at -0.7% from CMP; will trigger if momentum fails."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 598.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening ahead of ex-div tomorrow and after bearish candle on Apr 23."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BANDHANBNK +7.49% post-results but Jefferies/promoter overhang risks make chase risky — wait for pullback to 185-188 zone. MARUTI at 13410 with profit miss is mixed; better entry on retest of 12900-13000 support. BAJFINANCE results today = binary event, NO_ACTION on entry. ITC defensive accumulation candidate on dips below 305. CESC at 52w high with 3.4x volume but already extended; wait for consolidation. INDUSTOWER bearish (Jefferies downgrade, Q3 PAT -55%) — avoid. HEROMOTOCO interesting on Auto strength but pre-earnings (May 5) — wait.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 50% deployed across 8 positions — diversified mix of FMCG (NESTLE), Pharma (SUNPHARMA), Power/Energy cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA = ~14% of capital — at the edge of 'cluster' threshold), Metal (HINDZINC), Financial (PNBHOUSING), and ETF hedge (GOLDBEES). Rolling 5-day stats are poor (14% win rate, 0.4x profit factor) — discipline says NO new entries this tick beyond the pending GLENMARK/PHARMABEES/TATAPOWER orders already working. Focus is risk management: tightening SLs on NESTLEIND, POWERGRID, HINDZINC. Three open pending orders are sufficient pipeline; not adding more. Cash at 50% provides buffer."
}
